notes: fiatusa.com is the consumer site (returned 403 to WebFetch during Phase 1; press kit URLs on media.stellantisnorthamerica.com used as fallback). 500e is the entire US lineup. The MY26 trims are Pop and Icona. Stellantis press CDN: s3.amazonaws.com/chryslermedia.iconicweb.com. Two consumer pages exist (per-trim) — model_pages uses the 500e-pop URL since Pop is the base and the gallery is fuller; Icona shares the same page convention but is at /models/500e-icona.
